title: UPLIFT - 211info
text: WASHINGTON COUNTY OFFICE UPLIFT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides tutoring and academic support by helping youth and families navigate complex academic systems. Also provides leadership training, culturally-specific mentorship, and athletics. 6835 SW Clinton Street Tigard, OR 97223 Eligibility: Ages 9-26 who are immigrants or refugees Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm, Friday by appointment only Email (971) 254-8916 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 254-8916 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Amharic, Arabic, Farsi, Maay Maay, Pashto, Somali, Swahili AREA SERVED: Washington County Services: Tutoring Services * Immigrants Tutoring Services * Refugees/Entrants/Asylees Youth Enrichment Programs * Immigrants Youth Enrichment Programs * Refugees/Entrants/Asylees Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - BRIDGE MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - SHIFA HEALING CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WASHINGTON COUNTY OFFICE
